title: carlina frigida subsp. fiumensis
intro: Carlina frigida subsp. fiumensis is a subspecies of the Carlina frigida plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Carlina frigida subsp. fiumensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Carlina frigida subsp. fiumensis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
